title: Electric Diesel & Oil Transfer Pump, Auto-Stop Sensor(3.2GPM), 4 Tank Adapter & Leak Proof, 51" Hose, Portable Liquid Pump for Gasoline, Diesel, Oil
features: IMPORTANT NOTE: ①If the fuel pump stops after a period of time, it may be misjudged by the auto-stop sensor head, you can try to shake it or just wipe it with a clean cloth. ②The diameter of the suction port pump head is 1.2 inches, please check if it can fit into your tank!!! ③Not suitable for iron drum and 5 liter oil drum!!! ④The fuel tank and battery are not included in the product package!!!

Auto-Stop and Leak Proof: NITIGO automatic transfer fuel pump transfers up to 3.2 Gallons per Min (12 LPM) with Gasoline, Diesel, Kerosene, or Non-Potable Water. Prevent any fuel loss by automatically stopping the flow. Built-in locking clip secures nozzle on receiving receptacles for a hands free experience.

Muti-Power Supply: 3 power supply modes for gas can pump ① Direct connection of DC 12V Cable With Battery Clips to the Car Battery; ②Car Cigarette Lighter; ③ 4 x AA Battery (Not Included). In emergencies, it can utilize 4 (AA) Batteries to conserve power.

Different Drum Adapters: The 51-inch hose of gas can pump is made of highly durable polyethylene plastic, is rustproof and corrosion-resistant, and is used for long-distance transfer. Gasoline transfer pump fits most United Kingdom cans, gas siphon pump with 4 size universal adapters 2 inch / 2.1 Inch / 2.75 Inch /3.75 Inch, which can meet your different oil drums cans.

Easy to Use: An easy, multipurpose electric transfer pump built-in adapter screws directly into any standard gas can for No-spill siphoning.Convenient portable store bag keep gas pump in Your Trunk, Garage, Scrapyard, Shop, Toolkit, Shed, or Closet for Quick, Clean, Dependable Liquid Transfer. Great for Cars, Motorcycles, Boats, Lawn Mowers, Snowblowers,Automotive, Lawn, Aquariums, Generators, Etc.

Best Gifts for Family: Surprise fuel pump is ideal gift for dad and lovers. Perfect fuel transfer pump for Father's Day/Thanksgiving/Christmas/Valentine's Day/Birthday/New Year gifts for Family, Dad, Lovers, and Friends. The Best Way to Transfer Fuel, No More Heavy Lifting!

After using the product for a few times, it suddenly stops working, is the product failing? No, it may be that the sensor head stops automatically after a period of time when it comes into contact with liquid. You can wipe the sensor head, shake it or just wipe it with a clean cloth. Does it come with the tank? No, you are purchasing the pump only. Will it easily refill my tank? Is it easy to be operated? Works great, very easy to operate, you simply connect it to the power supply and it's ready to work!
